hero.title: Your complete beauty profile
hero.description: Upload a selfie for a free face-shape preview. Unlock once for six analysis infographics and a PDF. Add a personal Style Guide anytime as an optional add-on.

ctaBanner.title: Six infographics. One unlock.
ctaBanner.description: Face features, skin, colour, hairstyle, spectacles, and hair colour — each as a luxury infographic from your selfie, plus a downloadable analysis PDF.

reportSamples.label: Face Features Analysis
reportSamples.description: Eyes, brows, nose, lips, and cheeks mapped to tailored styling advice in one illustrated board.

reportSamples.label: Skin Analysis
reportSamples.description: Skin type, concerns, and AM/PM routine guidance in one shareable graphic.

reportSamples.label: Colour Analysis
reportSamples.description: Your seasonal palette — best clothing, makeup, and metal tones for your undertone.

reportSamples.label: Hairstyle Guide
reportSamples.description: Cuts and lengths matched to your face shape — a reference card you can take to your stylist.

reportSamples.label: Spectacles Guide
reportSamples.description: Frame shape, material, and colour recommendations tailored to your features.

reportSamples.label: Hair Colour
reportSamples.description: Flattering shade directions and placement ideas for your complexion.
